zh.Preston-Next-Wingham, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特普雷斯頓
zh.Grantham, Lincolnshire: 英國林可爾史爾格朗坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertram de Criol於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親John de Criol42歲，母親Margery de Spelmonden46歲。他和Emma de Sarre至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1256年在英國肯特薩享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertram de Criol于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲John de Criol42岁，母亲Margery de Spelmonden46岁。他和Emma de Sarre至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1256年在英国肯特薩享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Hipolito, Luis, Eriberto, Jose, Luisa, Ramon, Ricardo.  French/Haitian Edwige, Fritz, Serge, Yvrose.
Catalan: from the old personal name Oriol, from Latin Aureolus.

Catalan and French: nickname, possibly for a flamboyant dresser or sweet singer, from Catalan and Old French oriol ‘oriole’ (from Latin aureolus ‘golden’), a species of bird of which the male has bright yellow and black plumage. As a surname of French origin it is also common in Haiti.

variants.name: Oriel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Oriold, Oriel, from ancient Germanic Aurildis, Orieldis, composed of elements meaning ‘fire’ + ‘strife’.
French (Vosges): nickname from Old French oriel, a variant of oriol ‘oriole’ (see Oriol ).

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. Ravens were traditional symbols of wisdom in Germanic mythology; Odin was regularly accompanied by ravens called Hugin and Munin. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. See also Bertrand .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertram de Criol was born about 1190, in England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Criol, was 42 and his mother, Margery de Spelmonden, was 46. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Emma de Sarre. He died in 1256, in Sarre, Kent, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertram de Criol est né environ 1190, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Criol, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margery de Spelmonden, avait 46 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Emma de Sarre. Il est décédé en 1256, à Sarre, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertram de Criol um 1190 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Criol 42 und seine Mutter Margery de Spelmonden 46. Er hatte mit Emma de Sarre mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1256 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Sarre, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Criol è nato il circa 1190 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Criol, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Spelmonden, aveva 46 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Emma de Sarre. Morì nel 1256, nel Sarre, Kent, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertram de Criolが約1190年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Criolは42歳，母Margery de Spelmondenは46歳であった。彼はEmma de Sarreとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1256年にイギリスケントサアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertram de Criol(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Criol(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Spelmonden(은)는 46세였다. 그는 Emma de Sarre(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1256년 영국 켄트 사르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Criol nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Criol, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Spelmonden, tinha 46 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Emma de Sarre. Ele faleceu em 1256, em Sarre, Kent, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertram de Criol родился около 1190 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Criol было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Spelmonden, 46. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Emma de Sarre. Он умер в 1256 г. в местности сарр, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertram de Criol nació aproximadamente 1190, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Criol, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margery de Spelmonden, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Emma de Sarre. Murió en 1256, en Sarre, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
